business: Stop & Go Airport Shuttle Service Inc.
identifier: FAQ sections identified by the "Frequently Asked Questions" heading on each page.
notes: Two FAQ block types exist site-wide: a shared 'general' set (6 Q&As reused verbatim on many service/info/display pages) and 'unique' page-specific sets.
faq_type='general' pages all share the identical general_faq_set; load it once for a single shared accordion and skip per-page duplication.

Unique-set templates observed: airport-shuttle (10 Q&As, localized per city), the '24-7-{city}' limo template (6 localized Q&As), an 'Aurora limo' wine-tour set (6 Q&As), party-bus sets (6 Q&As), prom (10), limousine (10), and grad-day (6).
URL pattern does NOT reliably predict template (e.g. 24-7-joliet uses the 10-Q airport template; bolingbrook/oswego too). Every page was read individually.
Pages with a 'content_issue' field have live-site QA problems (mis-localized or mis-pasted FAQ copy). See content_bugs[] for the consolidated list.

general_faq_set.question: Do you offer group transportation or party bus services?
general_faq_set.answer: Yes, we have a range of party buses and vans suitable for groups of various sizes. Perfect for bachelor/bachelorette parties, corporate outings, or any group event.

general_faq_set.question: What is your cancellation and refund policy?
general_faq_set.answer: We offer flexible cancellation options. Please notify us at least 24 hours in advance for a full refund. Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the scheduled service may be subject to a fee.

general_faq_set.question: How far in advance should I book my limousine?
general_faq_set.answer: To ensure availability, especially during peak seasons and weekends, we recommend booking at least 1-2 weeks in advance. For special events like weddings or proms, booking as early as possible is advised.

general_faq_set.question: What happens if my flight is delayed?
general_faq_set.answer: No worries! We monitor all flight statuses in real-time and adjust pickup times accordingly at no extra cost. Your chauffeur will be there when you land, ready to take you to your destination.

general_faq_set.question: Are your prices all-inclusive or are there hidden fees?
general_faq_set.answer: We believe in transparency. Our quotes include all standard fees such as taxes, tolls, and gratuities unless otherwise stated and there are no hidden charges.

general_faq_set.question: Do your chauffeurs have professional training and background checks?
general_faq_set.answer: Yes, all our chauffeurs undergo thorough background checks, have professional driving licenses, and receive extensive customer service and safety training to guarantee a secure and pleasant ride.

faqs.question: How much does airport shuttle service cost from New Lenox or Naperville to O'Hare?
faqs.answer: Pricing varies by vehicle type, distance, and time. Sedans typically $75–95, SUVs and vans higher. Midway service $10–15 less. Round-trip bookings receive discounts. Contact us for exact quotes.

faqs.question: How early should I schedule pickup for my flight?
faqs.answer: Domestic flights: 2.5–3 hrs before departure. International: 3–4 hrs. Midway slightly less. Drivers account for traffic and TSA times.
